title: T-020 — UI: PM Schedule List + Wizard + Calendar views (MNT-022, MNT-023, MNT-M-02)
prompt:
# T-020 — PM Schedule pages + calendar

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §10.3 MNT-022, MNT-023, §10.4 MNT-M-02, §11.7 V-MNT-23
UX: prototypes/design/13-MAINTENANCE-UX.md:505-580
Prototypes: pm-schedules.jsx:1-275 (pm_schedules_list_page, pm_month_calendar, pm_week_calendar); modals.jsx:357-498 (pm_schedule_edit_wizard, pm_occurrence_skip_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Route `/maintenance/pm` with three views (list/week/month) plus 4-step PM Schedule Edit Wizard modal + PM Skip modal. Schedules consumed by T-009 PM engine.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/pm/page.tsx` — RSC + URL param `?view=list|week|month`; renders one of three components.
2. List view: shadcn Table; columns asset/type/interval/next_due/technician/status; row actions Edit/Skip/Deactivate; conditional row-overdue/row-due Tailwind styling via days-until computation.
3. Week calendar: asset × day grid (date-fns helpers replacing prototype hand-rolled math); `?weekOffset` URL param.
4. Month calendar: 7-col grid with eventsMap keyed yyyy-mm-dd; max 4 event chips + overflow; `?month=YYYY-MM` URL param.
5. Wizard: shadcn Steps primitive (T-019 shared) — 4 steps (Asset & Type, Frequency, Assignment, Review with Next 12 occurrences computed server-side). Operation_context field per V-MNT-23 with cross-ref validation against 02-Settings manufacturing_operations.
6. Skip modal: reason Select + notes Textarea (zod min 10) + optional Next-Due override; on submit appends skip audit row + emits outbox `pm_schedule.skip_threshold_exceeded` when count exceeds config.
7. RBAC: manager-only for Edit/Skip/Deactivate/Add.
8. Empty/loading/error/permission states.

## Prototype parity
- List + 3 views via URL param toggle — verify by RTL snapshot of pm-schedules.jsx:1-138.
- Month calendar 4-chip per day + overflow — snapshot of L140-216.
- Week calendar asset × day grid — snapshot of L218-275.
- Wizard 4-step stepper — snapshot of modals.jsx:357-472.
- Skip modal compliance metric warning Alert — snapshot of modals.jsx:474-498.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/pm/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/pm/_components/pm-list.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/pm/_components/pm-month-calendar.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/pm/_components/pm-week-calendar.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/pm/_components/pm-edit-wizard.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/pm/_components/pm-skip-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/pm/_components/__tests__/pm-list.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/pm/_components/__tests__/pm-wizard.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given /maintenance/pm?view=list, when rendered, then it matches pm-schedules.jsx:1-138 (table + 6-KPI strip + filter bar).
2. Given ?view=month, when rendered, then it matches pm-schedules.jsx:140-216 (7-col grid, 4-chip + overflow).
3. Given wizard submitted with all 4 steps, when settled, then maintenance_schedules row created and outbox pm_schedule.created emitted; V-MNT-23 valid operation_context attached.
4. Given pm-skip submitted with reason+notes, when settled, then pm_occurrence audit row + (if threshold exceeded) outbox pm_schedule.skip_threshold_exceeded emitted.
5. Given operator session, when /maintenance/pm renders, then Edit/Skip/Deactivate/Add buttons are hidden server-side.
6. Given closeout, when reviewers inspect evidence, then Playwright trace + screenshots attached per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity tests for 3 views + wizard + skip modal + RBAC. Playwright e2e for wizard flow.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/pm`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not hand-roll calendar math — use date-fns per translation notes.
- Do not enable usage_hours/usage_cycles interval_basis from wizard for P1 (calendar_days only).
- Do not bypass RBAC server-side.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not omit empty/loading/error/permission states.
